description: Following a severe storm, the Brooklyn Borough Director needs an urgent audit of street trees in Community Board 6 using the raw census data at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/brooklyn_cb6_trees.csv. Create a professional multi-sheet audit workbook saved as ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/tree_maintenance_audit.xlsx. The workbook must include a species diversity analysis calculating the total count and percentage for each species, flagging any species that comprise strictly more than 10.0% of the population. It must also identify high-risk trees (defined as tree_dbh >= 24 and either health = 'Poor' or status = 'Dead') and calculate their individual replacement costs (DBH × $150) along with a grand total replacement cost for all high-risk trees.
